LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT MICHAEL WHITE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. ALTHOUGH PROPERLY SERVED, DEFENDANT'S DILIGENCE IN ADDRESSING THE LITIGATION AND EFFORTS TO SECURE ASSISTANCE, ONCE HE HAD TO CONFRONT THE LITIGATION, BEGINNING PRIOR TO THE DEFAULT BEING TAKEN, JUSTIFY A FINDING OF EXCUSABLE NEGLECT SO THAT THE MATTER MAY BE HEARD ON THE MERITS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT MICHAEL WHITE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED, ALTHOUGH PROPERLY SERVED, DEFENDANT'S DILIGENCE IN ADDRESSING THE LITIGATION AND EFFORTS TO SECURE ASSISTANCE, ONCE HE HAD TO CONFRONT THE LITIGATION, BEGINNING PRIOR TO THE DEFAULT BEING TAKEN, JUSTIFY A FINDING OF EXCUSABLE NEGLECT SO THAT THE MATTER MAY BE HEARD ON THE MERITS.
